description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a deep red, textured cover that appears to be made of leather or faux leather. The front cover is adorned with a large, metallic pentagram at its center, surrounded by several round, metallic medallions or studs arranged in a circular pattern. Four wide, tan straps with metallic clasps run vertically across the cover, giving the book a reinforced and secure appearance. The edges of the cover show some wear, suggesting age or frequent handling. The pages are visible from the side, appearing off-white and tightly bound. The overall design gives the book a mystical or occult aesthetic, making it stand out as a unique personal item.
description: A thick, red leather-bound book with a metallic pentagram and medallions on the cover, secured by four tan straps with metal clasps. The book has a worn, mystical appearance.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the pentagram, metallic medallions, and four tan straps with metal clasps.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thickness of the pages and the way the straps wrap around the cover.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite side, showing the full length of the tan straps and the off-white pages.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the other end, again emphasizing the thickness and the arrangement of the straps and medallions.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large metallic pentagram at its center, surrounded by several round metallic medallions arranged in a circular pattern. Four wide tan straps with metal clasps cross the cover vertically, adding a reinforced, mystical look. No other illustration or artwork is visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is not clearly visible in any of the provided views.
